minimal_context: The student is expected to walk on the treadmill for two minutes during a one-on-one APE session.
dialogue:
TUTOR: It is time to walk on the treadmill for two minutes.

STUDENT: (Uses the break timer to request a break from instruction)

TUTOR: We need to do the treadmill first.

STUDENT: (Requests another break, taking a 5-minute long break)

TUTOR: Your break is over. Please stand up and walk on the treadmill.

STUDENT: (Lays on the floor screaming)

options.A: Hold a discussion with the student regarding the importance of completing the two-minute treadmill activity.
options.B: Control the student's access to the break timer and other preferred items in the instructional area.
options.C: Provide the student with praise for specific desirable behaviors at least once every two minutes.
options.D: End the treadmill activity for the session, recognizing there is no point in pushing the student further.
